overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person walk from a neon-lit covered commercial plaza with large digital billboards, through a transition corridor with illuminated floor panels, into a sunlit urban park area featuring an elevated highway overpass, dense bamboo groves, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial plaza with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza past neon advertisements and concrete planters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt standing near the railing

entered.detail: large pink digital billboard displaying 'WIDE OPEN' text with a green logo
colorful digital advertisement for 'Colossal Machinations' with vibrant character art
green digital billboard featuring a smiling face and 'SUPER SALADS 2' text
metal and concrete safety railing along the walkway edge
large structural support pillars for the overhead building structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban plaza dominated by large glowing digital billboards advertising various products. The camera moves forward along a concrete walkway bordered by railings and structural pillars, passing sparse pedestrians in a neon-lit cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with illuminated digital floor

events.description: entering the covered transition corridor leading from the plaza to the park
approaching the bright sunlit exit at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor toward the bright park exit ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the park exit

entered.detail: illuminated floor panels displaying colorful advertisements and patterns
dark concrete walls of the covered passageway
sunlit opening at the corridor end revealing green park vegetation

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow covered corridor with illuminated digital floor panels. The camera moves toward a bright exit where sunlight and greenery become visible, marking the transition from the artificial neon environment to the natural park setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban park with elevated highway overpass and bamboo groves

events.description: exiting the corridor into the open sunlit park area with trees and overpass
slight turn toward the yellow park kiosk structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the park pathway under the elevated highway, passing pedestrians and benches

notable_agents.action: woman in red jacket walking toward the camera
man sitting on a bench near the railing

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning overhead with multiple levels
tall palm trees lining the park walkway
dense cluster of bamboo and leafy trees forming the park backdrop
small yellow and green service kiosk with vending machines
elevated wooden decking forming the main park pathway

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a spacious urban park bathed in natural sunlight, dominated by a massive elevated highway overpass overhead. The camera walks along wooden pathways surrounded by dense bamboo groves and palm trees, passing moderate crowds of pedestrians and approaching a small service kiosk before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-drenched commercial plaza into a sunlit urban park. It begins by moving along a concrete walkway beneath massive glowing digital billboards and structural pillars within a covered cyberpunk environment. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a narrow transition corridor characterized by illuminated digital floor panels that lead toward a bright, open exit. The environment then expands into a spacious park bathed in natural light, where the artificial glow is replaced by the sight of a massive elevated highway overpass. Finally, the camera glides along wooden pathways through dense bamboo groves and palm trees, passing crowds of pedestrians toward a small service kiosk.
